# BrandProbe

> AI-powered marketing intelligence that analyzes your website and tells you exactly what to fix this week.

## What is BrandProbe?

BrandProbe is a website marketing analysis tool for startups and businesses. Enter your URL and get instant, actionable feedback on your messaging, SEO, content strategy, conversion optimization, and more.

## How it works

1. Paste your website URL
2. We probe and analyze 10 key marketing areas
3. You get specific, actionable fixes you can implement this week

## Key Features

- **Messaging & Positioning Analysis**: Evaluate clarity and effectiveness of your value proposition
- **SEO Opportunities**: Identify quick wins and long-term SEO improvements
- **Content Strategy**: Get recommendations for content that drives growth
- **Ad Angles**: Discover compelling angles for paid advertising
- **Conversion Optimization**: Find friction points and improve conversion rates
- **Distribution Strategy**: Learn the best channels to reach your audience
- **AI Search Visibility**: Optimize for AI-powered search engines
- **Technical Performance**: Identify speed and performance issues
- **Brand Health**: Assess overall brand perception and consistency
- **Design Authenticity**: Evaluate visual design and user experience

## Pricing

- Free: 1 website analysis
- Pro: $29/month for 10 reports with priority support
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for agencies and teams
